query:
SELECT a.created_at
                    FROM artifacts a
                    INNER JOIN virtual_repo_members vrm ON a.repository_id = vrm.member_repo_id
                    WHERE vrm.virtual_repo_id = $1
                      AND a.name = $2
                      AND a.version = $3
                      AND a.is_deleted = false
                    ORDER BY a.created_at ASC
                    LIMIT 1
